description: Easy-to-setup local RAG server with minimal configuration
name: io.github.shinpr/mcp-local-rag

environmentVariables.description: Base directory for document storage (defaults to current working directory). Ignored when BASE_DIRS is set.
environmentVariables.name: BASE_DIR

environmentVariables.description: JSON array of base directories (e.g. '["/a","/b"]'). Takes precedence over BASE_DIR.
environmentVariables.name: BASE_DIRS

environmentVariables.description: Path to LanceDB database directory (defaults to ./lancedb/)
environmentVariables.name: DB_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Directory where Transformers.js models are cached (defaults to ./models/)
environmentVariables.name: CACHE_DIR

environmentVariables.description: Maximum file size in bytes (defaults to 104857600 / 100MB)
environmentVariables.name: MAX_FILE_SIZE

environmentVariables.description: Maximum distance threshold for filtering search results. Results with distance greater than this value will be excluded. Lower values mean stricter filtering (e.g., 0.5 for high relevance only)
environmentVariables.name: RAG_MAX_DISTANCE

environmentVariables.description: Grouping mode for quality filtering. 'similar' returns only the most similar group (stops at first distance jump). 'related' includes related groups (stops at second distance jump). Unset means no grouping filter
environmentVariables.name: RAG_GROUPING

environmentVariables.description: Maximum number of files to keep in search results. Results are filtered to include only chunks from the top N best-scoring files. For example, 1 returns only the single best-matching file's chunks. Unset means no file filtering.
environmentVariables.name: RAG_MAX_FILES

environmentVariables.description: Minimum chunk length in characters (1-10000, defaults to 50). Chunks shorter than this threshold are filtered out during ingestion.
environmentVariables.name: CHUNK_MIN_LENGTH

environmentVariables.description: Execution device for the embedder (defaults to cpu). Passed straight to ONNX Runtime; see the Transformers.js device source for the supported backend names. If the requested device fails to initialize, the server throws an error.
environmentVariables.name: RAG_DEVICE

environmentVariables.description: Keyword boost factor for hybrid search (0.0-1.0, defaults to 0.6). 0 means semantic similarity only; higher values increase the keyword-match contribution to the final score.
environmentVariables.name: RAG_HYBRID_WEIGHT
